'''satacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetome|chaetome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetome|chaetome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| satacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sætæchæth|sætæchæth]] || [[word:sætæchæj|sætæchæj]] || [[word:sætæchæsh|sætæchæsh]] || [[word:sætæchæ|sætæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:satatachath|satatachath]] || [[word:satatachaj|satatachaj]] || [[word:satatachash|satatachash]] || [[word:satatacha|satatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:satachath|satachath]] || [[word:satachaj|satachaj]] || [[word:satachash|satachash]] || [[word:satacha|satacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:satafchath|satafchath]] || [[word:satafchaj|satafchaj]] || [[word:satafchash|satafchash]] || [[word:satafchaf|satafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:satachatha|satachatha]] || [[word:satachaja|satachaja]] || [[word:satachasha|satachasha]] || [[word:satachaka|satachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:satachath|satachath]] || [[word:satachaj|satachaj]] || [[word:satachash|satachash]] || [[word:satacha|satacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:satachathal|satachathal]] || [[word:satachajal|satachajal]] || [[word:satachashal|satachashal]] || [[word:satachakal|satachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:satachathatha|satachathatha]] || [[word:satachajaja|satachajaja]] || [[word:satachashasha|satachashasha]] || [[word:satachaka|satachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:satachathan|satachathan]] || [[word:satachajan|satachajan]] || [[word:satachashan|satachashan]] || [[word:satachakan|satachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:satachathaoro|satachathaoro]] || [[word:satachajaoro|satachajaoro]] || [[word:satachashaoro|satachashaoro]] || [[word:satachakaoro|satachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
